differential_diagnoses: Anemia (likely secondary to chronic gastrointestinal blood loss)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Sick sinus syndrome with chronotropic incompetence
next_steps: Obtain complete blood count with reticulocyte count and peripheral smear
Obtain iron studies, ferritin, and B12/folate levels
Perform repeat transthoracic echocardiogram to assess for valve gradient progression and diastolic function
Perform fecal immunochemical test (FIT) or occult blood testing
Perform 6-minute walk test to assess for exercise-induced hypoxemia or chronotropic incompetence
Schedule gastroenterology consultation for colonoscopy given age and 15-year lapse in screening
